mechanism_narrative: A rise in the housing market signal indicates an expansion of aggregate demand, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the unemployment rate signal indicates a weakening labor market, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production signal indicates a weakening supply chain, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in strengthening periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the retail sales signal indicates an expansion of aggregate demand, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the labor market signal indicates a strengthening labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP signal indicates a contraction of aggregate demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the inflation rate signal indicates a tightening monetary cycle, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the employment rate signal indicates a strengthening labor market, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in weakening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
